feature.name: MessagePack pack/unpack core
feature.description: Extract msgpack packb/unpackb, Packer/Unpacker streaming, ExtType/Timestamp extension types, and exception surface using the pure-Python fallback implementation without importing msgpack or compiled Cython extensions.
included_behaviors: packb/unpackb roundtrip for nil, bool, int, float, str, bytes, list, tuple, dict
Packer options: use_bin_type, use_single_float, default hook, datetime timestamps
Unpacker streaming feed/unpack, strict_map_key, raw/bin decoding, ext_hook
ExtraData, FormatError, StackError, OutOfData exception semantics
excluded_behaviors: Cython _cmsgpack accelerated path and .pyx/.h build artifacts
benchmark suite, docker images, docs, and upstream test harness

entanglement.description: Packer and Unpacker couple byte-buffer cursor state, msgpack format header tables, extension timestamp codecs, hook dispatch, and strict type checking across nested container recursion.
signals: Packer _pack recurses with nest_limit and default hook fallback
strict_map_key and ext_hook alter map key and extension construction

output.import: import featurelifted; from featurelifted import packb, unpackb, pack, unpack, dumps, loads, Packer, Unpacker, ExtType, Timestamp, ExtraData, FormatError
